DOCUMENT.source-infobase-title: The Rules of the City of New York

RECORD.HEADING: Chapter 34: [Air Pollution Control Code Fees]
RECORD.PARA: Chapter 34: [Air Pollution Control Code Fees]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-01 General Provisions.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-01 General Provisions.
This chapter establishes fees pursuant to Chapter 1 of Title 24 of the Administrative Code (the "Air Code"). [ALP S-001]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016) [ALP S-001]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-02 Definitions.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-02 Definitions.
All terms shall have the same meaning as the definitions set forth in § 24-104 of the Administrative Code. [ALP S-001]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016) [ALP S-001]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-03 Registration Fees.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-03 Registration Fees.
The fee for a new registration or registration renewal is as follows: [ALP S-001]
(a)(1)For boilers or water heaters: [ALP S-005]

COL.PARA: Fee No. 2 FUEL OIL &/Or NATURAL GAS
Fee No. 4 FUEL OIL ONLY OR #4 FUEL OIL & NATURAL GAS

RECORD.PARA: (2)The fee for each field re-inspection required because of a notice of disapproval for a major deficiency shall be equal to the fee required in paragraph (1) of this subdivision for those boilers and water heaters 2.8 to less than 4.2 MMBTU/HR. [ALP S-005]

(3)There shall be an additional fee imposed for each registration issued or renewed on the basis of a notarized affidavit supplied in response to a notice of disapproval for a minor deficiency issued after a field inspection shall be equal to fifty percent of the fee required in paragraph (1) of this subdivision for those boilers and water heaters 2.8 to less than 4.2 MMBTU/HR. [ALP S-005]

(b)For demolitions, a person applying for the registration of the demolition of a building shall pay a fee to be computed by multiplying the street frontage in feet by the number of stories of the building times 25 cents, provided that the minimum fee shall not be less than $250.00. Wherever a building shall have frontage on more than one street, the longer frontage shall be used in the above computation. [ALP S-001]

(c)For spraying of insulation, a person applying for the registration of the spraying of insulating material shall pay a fee to be computed by multiplying the street frontage in feet by the number of stories of the building times 60 cents, provided that the minimum fee shall not be less than $250.00. Wherever a building shall have frontage on more than one street, the longer frontage shall be used in the above computation. [ALP S-001]
(d)For generators: [ALP S-001]
For higher outputs, see subdivision (h) of 15 RCNY § 34-04. [ALP S-001]
(e)For engines: [ALP S-001]
For higher outputs, see subdivision (i) of 15 RCNY § 34-04. [ALP S-001]
(f)For cogeneration, and other fossil fuel burning equipment: [ALP S-001]
(g)For flares, one hundred ninety (190) dollars. [ALP S-001]
(h)For equipment used in a process with an environmental rating of C: [ALP S-001]
(i)For gasoline dispensing stations, one hundred ($190) dollars. [ALP S-001]
Editor's note: the fee in 15 RCNY § 34-03(i) above is presented herein exactly as promulgated by DEP Rule effective 3/29/2016.
(j)The fee to amend a registration shall be sixty-five ($65) dollars. [ALP S-001]
(k)The fee to register a commercial char broiler shall be one hundred ten ($110) dollars. [ALP S-001]
(l)The fee to register a mobile food vending unit shall be one hundred ten ($110) dollars, except that the fee will be waived for up to twelve (12) years if a Tier IV engine is installed. [ALP S-001]
(m)The fee for any other registrations shall be one hundred ten ($110) dollars. [ALP S-001]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016; amended City Record 8/5/2016, eff. 9/4/2016) [ALP S-005]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-04 Fees for Work Permits and Certificates of Operation.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-04 Fees for Work Permits and Certificates of Operation.

The fee for a new work permit required under § 24-121 of the Air Code, or for a new certificate of operation required under § 24-122 of the Air Code, or for a renewal of a certificate of operation, is as follows: [ALP S-001]
(a)For boilers and water heaters using fuel oil grade # 2 or natural gas: [ALP S-001]

COL.PARA: $1,440 plus $125 per additional 10 MMBTU/HR Or Fraction Thereof Not To Exceed $10,000.

RECORD.PARA: (b)For boilers and water heaters using fuel oil grade #4 or fuel oil grade #6: [ALP S-001]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: $1,440 plus $125 per additional 10 MMBTU/HR Or Fraction Thereof Not To Exceed $10,000.

RECORD.PARA: For boiler using both fuel oil and natural gas, the fee imposed will be based on the grade of fuel oil used. [ALP S-001]
(c) For equipment used in a process with an environmental rating of C: [ALP S-001]
(d)For equipment used in a process with an environmental rating of B: [ALP S-001]
(e)For equipment used in a process with an environmental rating of A: [ALP S-001]
(f)For dry cleaning equipment, two hundred and fifty ($250) dollars per unit. [ALP S-001]
(g)For cogeneration, and other fossil fuel burning equipment: [ALP S-001]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: $1,440 plus $125 per additional 10 MMBTU/HR Or Fraction Thereof Not To Exceed $10,000.

RECORD.PARA: (h)For generators: [ALP S-001]

COL.PARA: $1,440 plus $125 per additional 1,000 KW Or Fraction Thereof Not To Exceed $10,000.

RECORD.PARA: (i)For engines: [ALP S-001]

COL.PARA: $1,440 plus $125 per additional 1,350 HP Or Fraction Thereof Not To Exceed $10,000.

RECORD.PARA: (j)For refuse burning equipment, incinerators and crematoriums: [ALP S-001]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Cross Section of Chamber in SF

RECORD.PARA: (k)The fee to amend a work permit or certificate of operation shall be sixty-five ($65) dollars. [ALP S-001]

(l)The fee for an application to reinstate an expired permit to install or alter equipment or apparatus filed more than thirty days but less than one hundred eighty days after the expiration date of the permit shall be equal to fifty percent of the fee for the permit to install or alter equipment. [ALP S-001]

(m)The fee for an application to reinstate an expired permit to install or alter equipment or apparatus more than one hundred eighty days after the expiration date of the permit shall be equal to the fee for a permit to install or alter equipment. [ALP S-001]

(n)The fee for each field re-inspection required because of a notice of disapproval for a major deficiency shall be equal to the fee required in subdivisions (a) through (i) of this section. [ALP S-005]

(o)There shall be an additional fee imposed for each operating certificate issued or renewed on the basis of a notarized affidavit supplied in response to a notice of disapproval for a minor deficiency issued after a field inspection shall be equal to fifty percent of the fee required in subdivisions (a) through (i) of this section. [ALP S-005]

(p)The expiration date of a valid operating certificate may be abridged by the commissioner for the convenience of the department for good cause shown. The fee to renew the abridged operating certificate shall be reduced by one third per each full or partial year that the unabridged operating certificate would have been, as set forth in subdivisions (a) through (i) of this section. [ALP S-005]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016; amended City Record 8/5/2016, eff. 9/4/2016) [ALP S-005]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-05 Fees for Equipment Approvals.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-05 Fees for Equipment Approvals.
The fees for equipment approvals are as follows: [ALP S-001]

(a)For each application for acceptance of fuel burning equipment rated at equal to or greater than 2.8 million Btu per hour input or gross output firing rate, whichever is greater, $600.00. [ALP S-001]
(b)For each application for acceptance of apparatus, or of equipment other than fuel burning equipment, $400.00. [ALP S-001]
(c)For each application for an amendment of prior acceptance of equipment or apparatus, $300.00. [ALP S-001]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016) [ALP S-001]

RECORD.HEADING: § 34-06 Asbestos Fees.
RECORD.PARA: § 34-06 Asbestos Fees.
(a)An asbestos project notification (Form ACP7) shall be submitted with the following filing fee: [ALP S-001]

COL.PARA: Project Size in LF or SF

RECORD.PARA: (b)An application for an asbestos abatement permit shall be submitted with the following filing fee: [ALP S-001]

COL.PARA: Project Size in LF or SF
More than 25 to 99 LF or More than 10 to 49 SF
Large projects up to 1,000 LF or SF

RECORD.PARA: (c)The fee for a new or renewed asbestos certificate is as follows: [ALP S-001]

(d)For each variance application where the combined amount (total of both square and linear feet on the ACP-7) of ACM is less than 5,000 feet, payment of the variance processing fee shall accompany the application and shall conform with the payment schedule as follows: [ALP S-001]
(1)Request to modify no more than one lettered subsection in any section category listed in subsection (e) below: $400 fee. [ALP S-001]
(2)For each additional subsection in any category listed in subsection (e): $200 fee. [ALP S-001]
(3)The maximum fee: $1,200. [ALP S-001]

(e)For each variance application where the combined amount (total of both square and linear feet on the ACP-7) of ACM is greater than or equal to 5,000 feet, payment of the variance processing fee shall accompany the application and shall conform with the payment schedule as follows: [ALP S-001]
(1)Request to modify no more than one lettered subsection in any section category listed in subsection (e): $600. [ALP S-001]
(2)For each additional subsection in any category listed in subsection (e): $300. [ALP S-001]
(3)The maximum fee: $1,800. [ALP S-001]
(e)Section categories shall be as follows: [ALP S-001]
(Added City Record 3/29/2016, eff. 4/28/2016) [ALP S-001]
